heading: Wearing uniform on duty
label: 1944 Wearing uniform on duty
text: The officers, privates, and watchmen of the Capitol police shall, when on duty, wear the regulation uniform.
notes: CodificationSection was classified to section 212 of former Title 40, prior to the enactment of Title 40, Public Buildings, Property, and Works, by , , .Pub. L. 107–217, § 1116 Stat. 1062Aug. 21, 2002The text of this section was taken from act , popularly known as the “Legislative, Executive and Judicial Appropriation Act for the fiscal year ending ”.
